title: Static dictionary-lookup site/API over delivered dictionaries
context: A static, read-only lookup site/API over the delivered CC-BY dictionaries makes them easier to use. It is read-only over the CC-BY dictionaries and hosts no dataset content.
objective: Build a static, read-only dictionary-lookup site/API over the delivered CC-BY dictionaries.
acceptanceCriteria: Read-only lookup over delivered CC-BY dictionaries (no data hosting); attribution preserved per CC-BY.
Static build; code MIT; CI green.
output: PR to the repo adding the static dictionary-lookup site/API.
